response.overview: Aleya comes from a humble family and has a crush on her college classmate Syed Adam Aizril. Syed Aizril is well-known among women for his handsomeness and attractive appearance. As the son of a corporate figure, he is accustomed to a wealthy lifestyle and is proud of his family's wealth. He has high standards and always looks down on others. Unexpectedly, an incident occurs that brings Syed Aizril and Aleya together. Aleya begins her new life as a wife, but unfortunately Syed Aizril torments her life. Not long after, Syed Aizril suffers an accident. It changes his life and he regrets all his wrongdoings towards Aleya. For the sake of love and their children, Aleya also accepts Syed Aizril back into her life. Aleya and Syed Aizril live happily together with their children after overcoming various obstacles in their marriage. Syed Aizril and Aleya's marriage is challenged once again when Syed Aizril falls in love with Sharifah Emilin, who suddenly appears in his life.
response.title: Andai Itu Takdirnya
